jsonLd.title: Voylla is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
